title: Compare
description: A condition in a transaction that compares a key's attribute to a target value

target.description: The attribute of the key to compare

key.description: The key to compare in base64-encoded format

range_end.description: The range end for comparing a range of keys

version.description: Version to compare against when target is VERSION

create_revision.description: Create revision to compare against when target is CREATE

mod_revision.description: Mod revision to compare against when target is MOD

value.description: Value to compare against when target is VALUE in base64-encoded format

lease.description: Lease ID to compare against when target is LEASE
